data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a 0.37% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 04, 2025, 15:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 670.140015 USDT, with a narrowed 0.37% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Berachain Enhances Blockchain Security by Incentivizing Liquidity Participation
data.description:
TL;DR Berachain governance approved new reward vaults with incentives for long-term debt and increased liquidity in key tokens. The Bectra hard fork will activate this Wednesday, integrating Pectra execution-layer features without requiring changes to existing contracts. Berachain wallets will function as smart accounts, allowing batch transactions, scheduled payments, and gas fees paid in HONEY. Berachain
source: https://crypto-economy.com/berachain-enhances-blockchain-security-by-incentivizing-liquidity-participation/

data.title: BVNK Enables Instant Stablecoin-to-USD Conversion in Global Merchant Rollout
data.description:
TL;DR BVNK announced a new collaboration with LianLian Global to enable stablecoin-based payments in over 100 countries. BVNK’s technology automatically converts stablecoin deposits into US dollars, streamlining and accelerating the cross-border payment process. The partnership strengthens a faster and more efficient financial infrastructure, connecting more than 130 local currencies through LianLian’s global network. London-based fintech
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bvnk-enables-instant-stablecoin-to-usd-conversion-in-global-merchant-rollout/

data.title: The Blockchain Group plans to hold a shareholders meeting next week to seek approval to raise 10 billion euros
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: European listed company The Blockchain Group will hold its annual general meeting on June 10, 2025, seeking shareholder approval to raise 10 billion euros to accelerate its Bitcoin financial strategy. (Bitcoin News)

data.description:

data.title: Solana Analyst Sets $300 Target – Can Bulls Sustain A Rally?
data.description:
Solana (SOL) continues to face resistance at the $160 level, failing to reclaim it despite multiple attempts over the past several days. As market momentum weakens and volatility rises, investors are growing cautious. Bitcoin and Ethereum—typically leading indicators—are also showing signs of exhaustion, unable to break past their recent highs. This has triggered concerns that a broader market retrace could follow
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-analyst-sets-300-target-can-bulls-sustain-a-rally/

data.title: Web3 identity protocol Shards Protocol completes $2 million financing, Animoca Brands and others participate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 identity protocol Shards Protocol announced the completion of a $2 million financing, with participation from Animoca Brands, Kyber Ventures and Yield Guild Games. The funds will be mainly used to develop Aura, a system that converts user on-chain activities into verifiable reputation and rewards. The system plans to launch tokens and expand functions within the year, and users can unlock rewards by minting more badges. (Crypto.news)

data.title: South Korea’s new president will bolster crypto, but scandals prevail
data.description:
President Lee Jae-myung rose from being a child laborer in post-war South Korea to becoming a crypto-friendly leader of one of the world’s largest digital asset markets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korea-president-lee-jaemyung-crypto-scandals?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Arbitrum Foundation Launches $1 Million Trailblazer 2.0 Grant Program
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Arbitrum Foundation announced the launch of the Trailblazer 2.0 funding plan with a scale of $1 million. The plan is a continuation of the previous $1 million AI funding plan. A single project can receive up to $10,000 in funding. The funding scope includes: DeFi agents that execute profit strategies, functional plug-ins, open source agent templates and tool integration, etc. Priority is given to projects such as complex DeFi strategy templates, agent backtesting tools, and Farcaster mini applications.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 3046 ETH from Binance 1 hour ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 3,046 ETH worth US$7.96 million from Binance one hour ago.

data.title: Arbitrum Foundation Launches Trailblazer 2.0 Grant Program
data.description: According to PANews, the Arbitrum Foundation has announced the launch of the Trailblazer 2.0 grant program, offering $1 million in funding for impactful DeFi agents and contributors utilizing Vibekit. This initiative follows the previous $1 million AI grant program, with individual projects eligible for up to $10,000 in funding. The program's scope includes DeFi agents executing profitable strategies, functional plugins, open-source agent templates, and tool integrations. Priority will be given to projects involving complex DeFi strategy templates, agent backtesting tools, and Farcaster mini-applications. Developers can apply for funding by submitting deployed agents or templates.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Reach Lowest Level Since Early May
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the yields on U. S. Treasury bonds with maturities ranging from two to ten years have fallen to their lowest levels since May 9. This decline in yields reflects recent market trends and economic conditions.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/25167776288370?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: K Wave Media Secures $500 Million for Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, South Korean entertainment company K Wave Media has entered into a securities purchase agreement valued at up to $500 million to support its Bitcoin-centric crypto treasury strategy. The firm announced on June 4 that it has reached a deal with Bitcoin Strategic Reserve KWM for the sale of ordinary shares, aiming to raise funds for its Bitcoin treasury. This move is part of K Wave Media's broader strategy to integrate Bitcoin into its core operations, emphasizing decentralization, agility, and future-oriented value creation, as stated by Ted Kim, co-interim CEO of the company. K Wave Media has expressed ambitions to become the "Metaplanet of Korea," a vision that has significantly boosted its stock value following the adoption of a Bitcoin-focused strategy inspired by business intelligence company Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/25168101767282?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Global X Launches Bitcoin Covered Call ETF
data.description: According to PANews, asset management firm Global X has announced the launch of a Bitcoin Covered Call ETF, identified by the ticker BCCC. This actively managed fund aims to generate returns through an options strategy on Bitcoin ETF products without directly holding the underlying asset. The ETF employs a synthetic options strategy to establish a long position while earning premium income by selling call options. The options strategy, executed weekly, generates income that is partially distributed to investors on a weekly basis. This ETF is part of Global X's lineup of over 25 income-focused ETF products, designed to balance Bitcoin price volatility with income generation.

data.title: Global X Launches Bitcoin Covered Call Options ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Asset management company Global X announced the launch of the Bitcoin covered call option ETF (code: BCCC). This actively managed fund implements option strategies on Bitcoin ETF products to achieve returns without directly holding the underlying assets. (PRNewswire)
